scripts.check:catalog: node scripts/check-catalog-readiness.mjs && node scripts/check-catalog-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-catalog-api.mjs && node scripts/test-collections-api.mjs
scripts.check:pilot: node scripts/check-pilot-readiness.mjs && node scripts/check-pilot-security.mjs && node scripts/test-pilot-api.mjs
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:links && npm run check:production && npm run check:quality && npm run check:inventory && npm run check:data && npm run check:catalog && npm run check:migrations && npm run check:routes && npm run check:domain && npm run check:pilot && npm run check:backend && npm run check:security && npm run check:commercial && node scripts/check-commercial-release.mjs && npm run check:ux
scripts.predeploy: npm run build && npm run check:all && npm run check:catalog:release && npm run check:domain:release && npm run check:commercial:release && npm run check:pilot:release
